import { Observer, Subscription } from './types.js'; export declare class Store<T> { private atom; constructor(getValue: (prev?: NoInfer<T>) => T); constructor(initialValue: T); setState(updater: (prev: T) => T): void; get state(): T; get(): T; subscribe(observerOrFn: Observer<T> | ((value: T) => void)): Subscription; } export declare class ReadonlyStore<T> implements Omit<Store<T>, 'setState'> { private atom; constructor(getValue: (prev?: NoInfer<T>) => T); constructor(initialValue: T); get state(): T; get(): T; subscribe(observerOrFn: Observer<T> | ((value: T) => void)): Subscription; } export declare function createStore<T>(getValue: (prev?: NoInfer<T>) => T): ReadonlyStore<T>; export declare function createStore<T>(initialValue: T): Store<T>;
